title: Cambridge Ophthalmology Student Society
description1: Welcome to the Cambridge Ophthalmology Student Society Website!
description2: We bring together students across the university who are interested in ophthalmology, supporting their career ambitions through talks, conferences, and learning resources. From elective insights to specialty trainee experiences, we provide opportunities to explore the field and connect with peers and mentors.
description3: Our flagship Duke Elder Lecture Series offers a comprehensive program designed to support students preparing for the prestigious undergraduate ophthalmology exam. This year, it will run from March 2026: see the Events page for more details.
about: The Cambridge Ophthalmology Student Society (COSS) organises talks, teaching sessions, and social events for students interested in ophthalmology. We welcome members of all experience levels.
